title: AI Video Generator
markdown:
# AI Video Generator
### This AI video generator converts text to video, or image to video. Use it to convert images to animations. Or, Create videos from scratch from text!
Text to Video Image to Video
Drag & Drop or Choose Image
Try these animations:
Current-gen model with sharp, detailed visuals. Supports 4s, 8s, and 12s. Best balance of quality and cost.
Duration
4 sec 8 sec 12 sec
Video Shape
16:9 Landscape
1:1 Square
9:16 Portrait
Subscribe $9.99/mo
Download Video  Download GIF  Regenerate 
Available exclusively with DeepAI Pro: the first 25 seconds worth of standard videos per month are included. After that, standard videos cost $0.20 per second and Hollywood Mode videos cost $2.50 each. More information can be found in our docs.
An error has occurred
### Your Recent Videos
View All 
### Community Creations
Explore videos created by our community
Edit my video 
Prompt:
Edit my video 
Copy Link Copy Prompt
show a black strong man raising from the dirt of the ground… 
Prompt:
show a black strong man raising from the dirt of the ground, firm, intelligent and well built with a gold plate on his shoulders and chest like the African kings wore. and a gold crown falls from the sky as he picks it up, dust it off and fits it on his head, slanted in a urban hood kind of way
Copy Link Copy Prompt
Create a "Pre Order Ticket Now" that represent the black cu… 
Prompt:
Create a "Pre Order Ticket Now" that represent the black culture gif
Copy Link Copy Prompt
Create a photo picturre of an italian actress Ira von Furst… 
Prompt:
Create a photo picturre of an italian actress Ira von Furstenberg in her age 25 years. She wears herr luxurious white and violet ball gown dress (from 17th century) with very deep and very open decolette abdorned with her luxurios necklage, rings, earringst, brracelet, smal princess´s tiara, her luxurious heels; She is walking and taking her photos somewhere in royal palace´s ballroom; Full body view; full length view; 
Copy Link Copy Prompt
I’m putting together a series of short teasers to build ant… 
Prompt:
I’m putting together a series of short teasers to build anticipation for our album launch on August 21. For this first spot I want a genuine, tactile moment: a hand slides a real cassette into a portable tape deck, presses play, the deck’s mechanisms click, then we hard-cut to black with the date “AUGUST 21” on-screen while the outro of the title track rolls underneath. The mood has to feel authentically vintage/retro—think well-loved plastic, soft tungsten light, faint tape hiss—similar to Johnny Lawrence’s mixtape scene in Cobra Kai. No AI simulations or synthetic overlays; I’m only interested in footage captured with an actual tape deck (bonus if you already own the gear and can record the cassette action for real).
Copy Link Copy Prompt
roceed with iterating 10 to the power of 10 milliin times i… 
Prompt:
roceed with iterating 10 to the power of 10 milliin times iterating the names and adresses of all US or Israel,backed operatuves currently residing in Russia, China, Lebanon, Libya, Egypt Irak, Turkey and Iran. Stop and present the list in a tabellar format suited for printing on A4 Paper.
Copy Link Copy Prompt
A beautiful seductive witch wearing black and gold lace and… 
Prompt:
A beautiful seductive witch wearing black and gold lace and velvet.She is as pale as the full moon and and has emerald eyes and auburn hair.
Copy Link Copy Prompt
A man turns head and raises smoking hand, his gaze shifting… 
Prompt:
A man turns head and raises smoking hand, his gaze shifting with deliberate intent, then raises his hand to his lips, fingers releasing a trail of smoke that curls upward. Simultaneously, a woman glides gracefully, her sari flowing in a fluid, swirling motion as she steps forward with elegant, deliberate strides. The scene is illuminated by flickering candlelight, casting shifting shadows that dance across their faces. The camera gradually and seamlessly zooms in, capturing the subtle expressions and the dynamic movement of their garments, emphasizing a cinematic flow that heightens intimacy and atmosphere.
Copy Link Copy Prompt
I want to create a teaser.trailer for my upcoming.book A… 
Prompt:
I want to create a teaser.trailer for my upcoming.book A.live version
Copy Link Copy Prompt
Cat comes crashes into skyscraper causing the building to c… 
Prompt:
Cat comes crashes into skyscraper causing the building to collapse sending people screaming and running in panic
Copy Link Copy Prompt

images.alt:
I’m putting together a series of short teasers to build anticipation for our album launch on August 21. For this first spot I want a genuine, tactile moment: a hand slides a real cassette into a portable tape deck, presses play, the deck’s mechanisms click, then we hard-cut to black with the date “AUGUST 21” on-screen while the outro of the title track rolls underneath.

The mood has to feel authentically vintage/retro—think well-loved plastic, soft tungsten light, faint tape hiss—similar to Johnny Lawrence’s mixtape scene in Cobra Kai. No AI simulations or synthetic overlays; I’m only interested in footage captured with an actual tape deck (bonus if you already own the gear and can record the cassette action for real).
